info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Credit Memo Request API
info.description:
Create, read, update, and delete credit memo requests in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_CREDIT_MEMO_REQUEST_SRV) also enables approval or denial of credit memo requests that require authorization before processing. Credit memo requests are used to issue credit to customers for returns, pricing adjustments, or other reasons.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of credit memo requests

request.description: Returns a collection of credit memo request headers. Supports OData query options for filtering by document type, date, customer, and status.
